Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Court of Seven]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — Ozriel is the Eighth Judge of the Court of Seven.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — The Court of Seven is a group that Ozriel might be capable of hiding from.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — The Court of Seven issued a united ruling to salvage lives from the outer sectors.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — The second Court of Seven chose Daruman to be one of the first Executors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The Court of Seven has the authority to sentence Daruman to die.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — The Court of Seven is a group composed of Judges including the Hound and the Phoenix.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — The original Court of Seven built an ancient labyrinth before their ascension.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — The Court of Seven is a group that misplaced Ozriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — The Court of Seven took Ozmanthus into custody.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — The Court of Seven used Ozriel as a machete to beat back the wilderness of chaos and expand their holdings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — The first-generation Court of Seven ascended from Cradle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — The Court of Seven manifested together for the first time in centuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — The Court of Seven denied Ozriel's request to recruit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — The Court of Seven is a group that Makiel might disband.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — The Court of Seven is a group with authority.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — Makiel will hold himself accountable to the Court of Seven.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — The Court of Seven is a group that can retaliate.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — The Court of Seven is a group that Makiel wants to rebuild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — The Court of Seven has an old wound that Suriel seeks to patch over.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — The Court of Seven consists of members like the Fox, the Phoenix, and the Ghost.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — The Court of Seven is a governing body that the Judges report to.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — The Court of Seven scrutinizes the actions of Ozriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Court of Seven has restricted Eithan's abilities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Gadrael is the second member of the Court of Seven.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Court of Seven has not executed Ozriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Reaper Division seeks legitimacy in the eyes of the Court of Seven.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Abidan struck a blow on behalf of the Court of Seven.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Silverlord asks if she has the word of the Court of Seven.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Suriel has attempted to heal the Court of Seven.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — The Court of Seven stared at Eithan.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
